tasks.subject: Task 1: Harness (internal/e2e/harness_test.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compile-ready shared test harness with all 3 in-process servers and every HTTP helper method the tests call.

**Files:**
- Create: `internal/e2e/harness_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `go test -run '^$' -count=1 ./internal/e2e/` compiles without error
- [ ] `go vet ./internal/e2e/` reports no issues
- [ ] `newHarness`, `newHarnessWithAuth`, and all helpers have correct signatures

**Verify:** `go test -run '^$' -count=1 ./internal/e2e/` → `ok`

**Steps:**
- [ ] Create `internal/e2e/harness_test.go` with full harness code from plan
- [ ] Verify compilation
- [ ] Commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/e2e/harness_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run '^$' -count=1 ./internal/e2e/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["package compiles without error", "go vet passes", "all helper methods present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: STRM Mode Tests (internal/e2e/strm_test.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 7 passing STRM output mode tests covering all Sonarr/Radarr grab scenarios.

**Files:**
- Create: `internal/e2e/strm_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 7 tests pass
- [ ] No test >2 s wall-clock time
- [ ] TestMovieGrab_URL_Strm: .strm content starts with xtreamSrv.URL+"/movie/"
- [ ] TestSeriesGrab_URL_Strm: 3 .strm files in correct Season dirs
- [ ] TestWebhookStubCleanup_Strm: .mkv deleted, .strm preserved

**Verify:** `go test -v -count=1 -timeout 30s ./internal/e2e/ -run 'Strm|TestMovieGrab_AuthRequired|TestWebhookStub'` → 7 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/e2e/strm_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -v -count=1 -timeout 30s ./internal/e2e/ -run 'Strm|TestMovieGrab_AuthRequired|TestWebhookStub'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 7 tests pass", "no test >2s"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Download Mode Tests (internal/e2e/download_test.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 4 passing download output mode tests covering file writes, byte counts, progress tracking, and provider error handling.

**Files:**
- Create: `internal/e2e/download_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 4 tests pass
- [ ] TestMovieGrab_URL_Download: file size == 307200 bytes
- [ ] TestProgressTracking_Download: intermediate progress observed
- [ ] TestProviderError_Download: waitForState times out, no file on disk

**Verify:** `go test -v -count=1 -timeout 60s ./internal/e2e/ -run 'Download'` → 4 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/e2e/download_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -v -count=1 -timeout 60s ./internal/e2e/ -run 'Download'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 4 tests pass", "file sizes byte-exact", "intermediate progress observed"]}
```
